title: Midtown Terrace Park and Sutro Recreation Center in San Francisco | Map and Routes
content: April 1, 2026 - Don't miss the chance to experience the rejuvenating atmosphere of Midtown Terrace Park and Sutro Recreation Center. Whether you're a local resident or a visitor to the city, this park promises a delightful escape from the urban bustle .

title: Midtown Terrace Playground and Sutro Recreation Center in San Francisco, CA
content: In the unlikely event that I manage to both have kids and stay in San Francisco (and especially in the not-too-dense, not-too-sprawly Inner West Side), I could well end up being a frequent visitor here. But for now, I just have to note one thing: this looks like a big, juicy park on most maps, but over 90% of that is actually taken up by a massive, concrete-topped reservoir, and the playground proper is just a tiny chunk of land at the corner of Olympia and Clarendon. Still, it’s an idyllic setting, especially with the church and fire station across the street and Sutro tower looming overhead (say what you will, I like it).
